notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Luis Rengifo reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Jonathan Aranda. William Contreras to 2nd. William Contreras advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by first baseman Jonathan Aranda.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson grounds into a double play, shortstop David Hamilton to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. Junior Caminero out at 2nd. Ben Williamson out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sal Frelick GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Carson Williams to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Jake Bauers out at 2nd. Sal Frelick out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Blake Perkins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Blake Perkins grounds into a force out, fielded by shortstop Carson Williams. Sal Frelick out at 2nd.
